settings.defaultLanguageDescription: Set the default display language for this instance.
settings.censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output.
settings.slackIntegrationDescription: Connect a Slack bot to receive inbox notifications and interact with agents.
settings.slackTokensRequired: Bot Token, App Token, and Channel ID are all required to enable Slack.
settings.slackGuideStep1Desc: Go to api.slack.com/apps > Create New App > From scratch. Name it (e.g., ClippaperAI) and select your workspace.
settings.slackGuideStep2Title: Enable Socket Mode & get App Token
settings.slackGuideStep2Desc: Go to Socket Mode > Enable. Create an App-Level Token with connections:write scope. Copy the xapp- token.
settings.slackGuideStep3Desc: Go to OAuth & Permissions > Bot Token Scopes. Add: chat:write, commands, im:history, im:read, im:write, channels:history, reactions:write. Then install the app and copy the xoxb- token.
settings.slackGuideStep4Desc: Go to Slash Commands > Create New Command. Set command to /clip.
settings.slackGuideStep5Desc: Go to Event Subscriptions > Enable Events > Subscribe to: message.im, message.channels. Then go to App Home > Enable Messages Tab.
settings.slackGuideStep6Desc: In Slack, type /invite @ClippaperAI in your channel. Then fill in the tokens and Channel ID below and save.

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to ClippaperAI. Set up your first company and agent to get started.

costsPage.title: Costs
costsPage.subtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costsPage.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costsPage.selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
costsPage.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.

costsPage.financeLedgerDesc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.

costsPage.byAgentDesc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costsPage.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costsPage.budgetControlPlaneDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
costsPage.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costsPage.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costsPage.resolveIncidents: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.

costsPage.projectBudgetDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.

costsPage.noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
costsPage.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
costsPage.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
costsPage.noFinanceEventsTimeline: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

executionWorkspace.description: Configure the concrete runtime workspace that ClippaperAI reuses for this issue flow. These settings stay attached to the execution workspace so future runs can keep local paths, repo refs, provisioning, teardown, and runtime-service behavior in sync with the actual workspace being reused.
executionWorkspace.provisionCommandHint: Runs when ClippaperAI prepares this execution workspace
executionWorkspace.teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up

projectWorkspace.description: Configure the concrete workspace ClippaperAI attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
projectWorkspace.isPrimaryWorkspace: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.
projectWorkspace.runtimeServicesDescription: Shared services for this project workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
projectWorkspace.workspaceNotFound: Workspace not found for this project.

experimentalSettings.title: Experimental
experimentalSettings.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimentalSettings.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimentalSettings.autoRestartDevServerDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
